targets.rawSql:
WITH pos_lead AS (
  SELECT p.drive_id, p.power,
    COALESCE(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (LEAD(p.date) OVER (PARTITION BY p.drive_id ORDER BY p.date) - p.date)), 0) AS interval_sec
  FROM positions p
  JOIN drives d ON d.id = p.drive_id
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
    AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
),
regen AS (
  SELECT drive_id,
    SUM(CASE WHEN power < 0 THEN ABS(power) * GREATEST(interval_sec, 0) / 3600.0 ELSE 0 END) AS regen_kwh
  FROM pos_lead GROUP BY drive_id
)
SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(regen_kwh), 0)::numeric, 2) AS total_regen_kwh
FROM regen;

WITH pos_lead AS (
  SELECT p.drive_id, p.power,
    COALESCE(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (LEAD(p.date) OVER (PARTITION BY p.drive_id ORDER BY p.date) - p.date)), 0) AS interval_sec
  FROM positions p
  JOIN drives d ON d.id = p.drive_id
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
    AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
),
regen AS (
  SELECT drive_id,
    SUM(CASE WHEN power < 0 THEN ABS(power) * GREATEST(interval_sec, 0) / 3600.0 ELSE 0 END) AS regen_kwh
  FROM pos_lead GROUP BY drive_id
)
SELECT ROUND(AVG(regen_kwh)::numeric, 2) AS avg_regen_kwh
FROM regen WHERE regen_kwh > 0;

panels.title: 平均回收率
panels.description: 动能回收电量占（行驶消耗 + 回收量）的平均比例

targets.rawSql:
WITH pos_lead AS (
  SELECT p.drive_id, p.power,
    COALESCE(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (LEAD(p.date) OVER (PARTITION BY p.drive_id ORDER BY p.date) - p.date)), 0) AS interval_sec
  FROM positions p
  JOIN drives d ON d.id = p.drive_id
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
    AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
),
regen AS (
  SELECT drive_id,
    SUM(CASE WHEN power < 0 THEN ABS(power) * GREATEST(interval_sec, 0) / 3600.0 ELSE 0 END) AS regen_kwh
  FROM pos_lead GROUP BY drive_id
),
drive_energy AS (
  SELECT d.id AS drive_id,
    GREATEST(COALESCE((d.start_ideal_range_km - d.end_ideal_range_km) * c.efficiency / 1000.0, 0), 0) AS drive_kwh
  FROM drives d
  JOIN cars c ON c.id = d.car_id
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
    AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND d.start_ideal_range_km > d.end_ideal_range_km
)
SELECT ROUND(AVG(r.regen_kwh / NULLIF(r.regen_kwh + de.drive_kwh, 0) * 100)::numeric, 1) AS avg_pct
FROM regen r
JOIN drive_energy de ON de.drive_id = r.drive_id
WHERE r.regen_kwh > 0 AND de.drive_kwh > 0;

WITH pos_lead AS (
  SELECT p.drive_id, p.power,
    COALESCE(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (LEAD(p.date) OVER (PARTITION BY p.drive_id ORDER BY p.date) - p.date)), 0) AS interval_sec
  FROM positions p
  JOIN drives d ON d.id = p.drive_id
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
    AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
),
regen AS (
  SELECT drive_id,
    SUM(CASE WHEN power < 0 THEN ABS(power) * GREATEST(interval_sec, 0) / 3600.0 ELSE 0 END) AS regen_kwh
  FROM pos_lead GROUP BY drive_id
)
SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(MAX(regen_kwh), 0)::numeric, 2) AS max_regen_kwh
FROM regen;

panels.title: 各固件版本平均回收率(%)
panels.description: 升级前后对比：回收率下降说明新版本降低了制动能量回收强度。

targets.rawSql:
WITH pos_lead AS (
  SELECT p.drive_id, p.power,
    COALESCE(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (LEAD(p.date) OVER (PARTITION BY p.drive_id ORDER BY p.date) - p.date)), 0) AS interval_sec
  FROM positions p
  JOIN drives d ON d.id = p.drive_id
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
    AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
),
regen AS (
  SELECT drive_id,
    SUM(CASE WHEN power < 0 THEN ABS(power) * GREATEST(interval_sec, 0) / 3600.0 ELSE 0 END) AS regen_kwh
  FROM pos_lead GROUP BY drive_id
),
combined AS (
  SELECT
    r.regen_kwh,
    GREATEST(COALESCE((d.start_ideal_range_km - d.end_ideal_range_km) * c.efficiency / 1000.0, 0), 0) AS drive_kwh,
    COALESCE(
      (SELECT SPLIT_PART(u.version, ' ', 1) FROM updates u
       WHERE u.car_id = $car_id AND u.start_date <= d.start_date
       ORDER BY u.start_date DESC LIMIT 1),
      '未知'
    ) AS fw_version
  FROM regen r
  JOIN drives d ON d.id = r.drive_id
  JOIN cars c ON c.id = d.car_id
  WHERE r.regen_kwh > 0
)
SELECT
  fw_version AS "固件版本",
  ROUND(AVG(regen_kwh / NULLIF(regen_kwh + drive_kwh, 0) * 100)::numeric, 1) AS "平均回收率(%)"
FROM combined
WHERE drive_kwh > 0
GROUP BY fw_version
ORDER BY
  CASE WHEN fw_version LIKE '20%' THEN SPLIT_PART(fw_version, '.', 1)::int ELSE 0 END DESC,
  CASE WHEN fw_version LIKE '20%' THEN SPLIT_PART(fw_version, '.', 2)::int ELSE 0 END DESC,
  CASE WHEN fw_version LIKE '20%' THEN SPLIT_PART(fw_version, '.', 3)::int ELSE 0 END DESC;

panels.title: 日均回收率趋势(%)
panels.description: 折线图显示每日平均回收率变化，可观察固件升级前后的明显拐点。

targets.rawSql:
WITH pos_lead AS (
  SELECT p.drive_id, p.power, d.start_date,
    COALESCE(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (LEAD(p.date) OVER (PARTITION BY p.drive_id ORDER BY p.date) - p.date)), 0) AS interval_sec
  FROM positions p
  JOIN drives d ON d.id = p.drive_id
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
    AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
),
regen AS (
  SELECT drive_id, MAX(start_date) AS start_date,
    SUM(CASE WHEN power < 0 THEN ABS(power) * GREATEST(interval_sec, 0) / 3600.0 ELSE 0 END) AS regen_kwh
  FROM pos_lead GROUP BY drive_id
),
combined AS (
  SELECT r.start_date,
    r.regen_kwh / NULLIF(r.regen_kwh + GREATEST(COALESCE((d.start_ideal_range_km - d.end_ideal_range_km) * c.efficiency / 1000.0, 0), 0), 0) * 100 AS regen_pct
  FROM regen r
  JOIN drives d ON d.id = r.drive_id
  JOIN cars c ON c.id = d.car_id
  WHERE r.regen_kwh > 0 AND d.start_ideal_range_km > d.end_ideal_range_km
)
SELECT
  date_trunc('day', start_date) AS time,
  ROUND(AVG(regen_pct)::numeric, 1) AS "日均回收率(%)"
FROM combined
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: 各固件版本下记录到的最大瞬时回收功率(kW)。数值下降说明新版本限制了回收峰值功率。
panels.title: 各固件版本最大回收功率(kW)

targets.rawSql:
WITH drive_version AS (
  SELECT
    d.id AS drive_id,
    COALESCE(
      (SELECT SPLIT_PART(u.version, ' ', 1) FROM updates u
       WHERE u.car_id = $car_id AND u.start_date <= d.start_date
       ORDER BY u.start_date DESC LIMIT 1),
      '未知'
    ) AS fw_version
  FROM drives d
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  dv.fw_version AS "固件版本",
  ROUND(MAX(ABS(p.power))::numeric, 1) AS "最大回收功率(kW)"
FROM positions p
JOIN drive_version dv ON dv.drive_id = p.drive_id
WHERE p.power < 0
GROUP BY dv.fw_version
ORDER BY
  CASE WHEN dv.fw_version LIKE '20%' THEN SPLIT_PART(dv.fw_version, '.', 1)::int ELSE 0 END DESC,
  CASE WHEN dv.fw_version LIKE '20%' THEN SPLIT_PART(dv.fw_version, '.', 2)::int ELSE 0 END DESC,
  CASE WHEN dv.fw_version LIKE '20%' THEN SPLIT_PART(dv.fw_version, '.', 3)::int ELSE 0 END DESC;

panels.description: 按历史最大回收功率从高到低排序，可快速找出哪个版本回收峰值最强。数据不受时间范围过滤影响，展示全历史记录。
panels.title: 各固件版本最大回收功率排名(kW)

targets.rawSql:
WITH drive_version AS (
  SELECT
    d.id AS drive_id,
    COALESCE(
      (SELECT SPLIT_PART(u.version, ' ', 1) FROM updates u
       WHERE u.car_id = $car_id AND u.start_date <= d.start_date
       ORDER BY u.start_date DESC LIMIT 1),
      '未知'
    ) AS fw_version
  FROM drives d
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  dv.fw_version AS "固件版本",
  ROUND(MAX(ABS(p.power))::numeric, 1) AS "最大回收功率(kW)"
FROM positions p
JOIN drive_version dv ON dv.drive_id = p.drive_id
WHERE p.power < 0
GROUP BY dv.fw_version
ORDER BY "最大回收功率(kW)" DESC;

WITH pos_lead AS (
  SELECT p.drive_id, p.power, d.start_date,
    COALESCE(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (LEAD(p.date) OVER (PARTITION BY p.drive_id ORDER BY p.date) - p.date)), 0) AS interval_sec
  FROM positions p
  JOIN drives d ON d.id = p.drive_id
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
    AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
),
regen AS (
  SELECT drive_id, MAX(start_date) AS start_date,
    SUM(CASE WHEN power < 0 THEN ABS(power) * GREATEST(interval_sec, 0) / 3600.0 ELSE 0 END) AS regen_kwh
  FROM pos_lead GROUP BY drive_id
)
SELECT
  date_trunc('day', start_date) AS time,
  ROUND(SUM(regen_kwh)::numeric, 2) AS "每日回收(kWh)"
FROM regen
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

WITH pos_lead AS (
  SELECT p.drive_id, p.power, d.start_date,
    COALESCE(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (LEAD(p.date) OVER (PARTITION BY p.drive_id ORDER BY p.date) - p.date)), 0) AS interval_sec
  FROM positions p
  JOIN drives d ON d.id = p.drive_id
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
    AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
),
regen AS (
  SELECT drive_id, MAX(start_date) AS start_date,
    SUM(CASE WHEN power < 0 THEN ABS(power) * GREATEST(interval_sec, 0) / 3600.0 ELSE 0 END) AS regen_kwh
  FROM pos_lead GROUP BY drive_id
)
SELECT
  date_trunc('week', start_date) AS time,
  ROUND(SUM(regen_kwh)::numeric, 2) AS "每周回收(kWh)"
FROM regen
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.description: 低温下电池内阻增大，动能回收功率受限，点越靠左回收率越低。
panels.title: 温度 vs 回收率散点图

targets.rawSql:
WITH pos_lead AS (
  SELECT p.drive_id, p.power,
    COALESCE(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (LEAD(p.date) OVER (PARTITION BY p.drive_id ORDER BY p.date) - p.date)), 0) AS interval_sec
  FROM positions p
  JOIN drives d ON d.id = p.drive_id
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
    AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND d.outside_temp_avg IS NOT NULL
    AND d.distance > 5
),
regen AS (
  SELECT drive_id,
    SUM(CASE WHEN power < 0 THEN ABS(power) * GREATEST(interval_sec, 0) / 3600.0 ELSE 0 END) AS regen_kwh
  FROM pos_lead GROUP BY drive_id
)
SELECT
  ROUND(d.outside_temp_avg::numeric, 0) AS outside_temp,
  ROUND((r.regen_kwh / NULLIF(r.regen_kwh + GREATEST(COALESCE((d.start_ideal_range_km - d.end_ideal_range_km) * c.efficiency / 1000.0, 0), 0), 0) * 100)::numeric, 1) AS "回收率(%)"
FROM regen r
JOIN drives d ON d.id = r.drive_id
JOIN cars c ON c.id = d.car_id
WHERE r.regen_kwh > 0
  AND d.start_ideal_range_km > d.end_ideal_range_km
ORDER BY outside_temp;

panels.description: 不同时速区间下的平均回收功率(kW)，高速制动回收更多能量。
panels.title: 时速区间 vs 平均回收功率(kW)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  speed_range AS "时速区间",
  ROUND(AVG(ABS(power))::numeric, 1) AS "平均回收功率(kW)"
FROM (
  SELECT
    p.power,
    CASE
      WHEN p.speed < 30  THEN '0-30 km/h'
      WHEN p.speed < 60  THEN '30-60 km/h'
      WHEN p.speed < 90  THEN '60-90 km/h'
      WHEN p.speed < 120 THEN '90-120 km/h'
      ELSE '>120 km/h'
    END AS speed_range,
    CASE
      WHEN p.speed < 30  THEN 1
      WHEN p.speed < 60  THEN 2
      WHEN p.speed < 90  THEN 3
      WHEN p.speed < 120 THEN 4
      ELSE 5
    END AS sort_key
  FROM positions p
  JOIN drives d ON d.id = p.drive_id
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
    AND p.power < 0
    AND p.speed IS NOT NULL
    AND p.speed > 0
) t
GROUP BY speed_range, sort_key
ORDER BY sort_key;

panels.title: 行程回收明细 TOP20（时间范围内）
panels.description: 回收率 = 回收电量 / (行驶消耗 + 回收电量)。可查看固件版本与回收率的关联。

targets.rawSql:
WITH pos_lead AS (
  SELECT p.drive_id, p.power,
    COALESCE(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (LEAD(p.date) OVER (PARTITION BY p.drive_id ORDER BY p.date) - p.date)), 0) AS interval_sec
  FROM positions p
  JOIN drives d ON d.id = p.drive_id
  WHERE d.car_id = $car_id
    AND $__timeFilter(d.start_date)
    AND d.end_date IS NOT NULL
    AND d.distance > 5
),
regen AS (
  SELECT drive_id,
    SUM(CASE WHEN power < 0 THEN ABS(power) * GREATEST(interval_sec, 0) / 3600.0 ELSE 0 END) AS regen_kwh
  FROM pos_lead GROUP BY drive_id
)
SELECT
  TO_CHAR(d.start_date AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "出发时间",
  ROUND(d.distance::numeric, 1) AS "里程(km)",
  ROUND(r.regen_kwh::numeric, 2) AS "回收电量(kWh)",
  ROUND((r.regen_kwh / NULLIF(r.regen_kwh + GREATEST(COALESCE((d.start_ideal_range_km - d.end_ideal_range_km) * c.efficiency / 1000.0, 0), 0), 0) * 100)::numeric, 1) AS "回收率(%)",
  ROUND(d.outside_temp_avg::numeric, 1) AS "均温(°C)",
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT SPLIT_PART(u.version, ' ', 1) FROM updates u
     WHERE u.car_id = $car_id AND u.start_date <= d.start_date
     ORDER BY u.start_date DESC LIMIT 1),
    '未知'
  ) AS "固件版本"
FROM regen r
JOIN drives d ON d.id = r.drive_id
JOIN cars c ON c.id = d.car_id
WHERE r.regen_kwh > 0
  AND d.start_ideal_range_km > d.end_ideal_range_km
ORDER BY "回收率(%)" DESC
LIMIT 20;

list.definition: SELECT id AS __value, name AS __text FROM cars ORDER BY id
list.label: 车辆
list.name: car_id
list.query: SELECT id AS __value, name AS __text FROM cars ORDER BY id
